pi_items.source: Confirmed by inspecting setup_task.sh which explicitly requires and copies this data file.
Confirmed by inspecting export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the screenshot at this path.
Confirmed by inspecting verifier.py's VLM prompt which checks if odd-numbered channels (1, 3, 5, 7) are turned ON/VISIBLE.
Confirmed by inspecting verifier.py's VLM prompt which checks if even-numbered channels (2, 4, 6, 8) are turned OFF/HIDDEN.
Confirmed by inspecting verifier.py's VLM prompt which checks if the window duration is set to approximately 10 seconds.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the OpenBCI GUI using the 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt' recording, containing real EEG data from the PhysioNet dataset for subject S001. A correct configuration features odd-numbered channels (1, 3, 5, 7) turned ON, even-numbered channels (2, 4, 6, 8) turned OFF, and a time window of 10 seconds. Finally, the resulting setup must be saved as a screenshot at '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/left_hemi_montage.png'.
